title: Spring Pudding with Honey Crostini
description: A sweet spring-inspired dessert featuring honey-infused pudding atop a toasted crostini topped with fresh spring herbs.

ingredients.name: Fresh Spring Herbs
ingredients.notes: chopped (such as parsley, chives, or dill)

instructions: 2. Slice the baguette into 1-inch thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
3. In a small saucepan, combine honey, granulated sugar, and lemon zest (if using). Heat over low heat, stirring until sugar dissolves.
4. Pour the honey mixture over the toasted crostini and sprinkle with xenial cheese.
5. In a separate saucepan, heat the pudding according to package instructions.
6. Spoon the pudding over the crostini and top with chopped spring herbs.
7. Drizzle with croatian yogurt and serve immediately.
